pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java from 8.75.2 to 8.75.3 in the openrewrite group across 1 directory
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 1 update in the / directory: [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite). Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.75.2 to 8.75.3
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.75.3

What's Changed

  • Handle new ty-types 0.0.21 descriptor kinds and enriched fields by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6893
  • UpgradeTransitiveDependencyVersion should not add managed deps to child modules by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6896
  • JavaScript: Add missing Type properties to some test classes by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6901
  • Also check thread context classloader in TypeTable.fromClasspath() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6900
  • Fix NPE in Markup.markup() when tree node has null markers by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6895
  • Filter SNAPSHOT versions from BOM upgrade candidates by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6902
  • Support ext subscript and set-in-block syntax for version upgrades by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6905
  • JavaScript: Detect empty diffs in rewriteRun() test harness and fix surfaced issues by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6904
  • Improved C# RPC server bootstrapping by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6899
  • Add tests for Gradle 9 migration and best practices recipes by @​sullis in openrewrite/rewrite#6907
  • Add NuGet API key to CI and publish workflows by @​macsux in openrewrite/rewrite#6911
  • Split C# NuGet into library and tool packages by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6912
  • Fix ScanningRecipe accumulator loss in preconditioned DeclarativeRecipes across RecipeRunCycles by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6913
  • fix: switch npm publishing to OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6919
  • fix: add setup-node for npm OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6922
  • Fix Python RPC GetObject timeout on Windows by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#6920
  • Fix NoWhitespaceAfter removing required space after type-use annotation by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6921
  • fix: decouple npmPublish from Gradle publish task for OIDC-only npm auth by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6923
  • fix: add workflow_dispatch to npm-publish for manual OIDC testing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6924
  • fix: replace setup-node with manual .npmrc for npm OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6925
  • fix: use system npm for publish to support OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6926
  • fix: use system npm for publish to support OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6927
  • fix: use NPM_TOKEN for npm publish authentication by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6928
  • fix: add repository field to package.json for npm provenance by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6929
  • fix: switch npm publish back to OIDC trusted publishing by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6930
  • fix: revert OIDC-only npm auth, restore NPM_TOKEN by @​zieka in openrewrite/rewrite#6931
  • Isolate C# plugin assemblies in custom AssemblyLoadContext by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6915
  • C# Template API for pattern matching and code generation by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6916

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.75.2...v8.75.3

Commits
  • 5148950 C# Template API for pattern matching and code generation (#6916)
  • 01ae722 Isolate plugin assemblies in custom AssemblyLoadContext to fix type identity ...
  • 997287f Revert "fix: remove NPM_TOKEN, use OIDC trusted publishing for npm auth (#693...
  • 8d60a63 fix: remove NPM_TOKEN, use OIDC trusted publishing for npm auth (#6930)
  • ebdab0a fix: add repository field to package.json for npm provenance verification (#6...
  • faafc29 fix: pass NPM_TOKEN for npm publish authentication (#6928)
  • 419edda fix: use system npm for publish to support OIDC trusted publishing (#6927)
  • 14f3c45 fix: use system npm for publish to support OIDC trusted publishing (#6926)
  • 47fda3e fix: replace setup-node with manual .npmrc for npm OIDC trusted publishing (#...
  • 75cd7cf fix: add workflow_dispatch trigger to npm-publish for manual testing (#6924)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
